nasb.text: Then Delilah said to Samson, “Behold, you have deceived me and told me lies; now please tell me how you may be bound.”

esv.text: Then Delilah said to Samson, “Behold, you have mocked me and told me lies. Please tell me how you might be bound.”

cnv.text: 大利拉對參孫說：“你作弄我，向我說謊；現在求你告訴我，用甚麼東西才能把你捆綁。”

ccb.text: 大利拉对参孙说：“你说谎捉弄我。现在请你告诉我，用什么方法才能绑住你？”
